title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Byju's Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Byju's Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Byju's Digital Technologies in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's Digital Technologies:
Byju's Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
